notes: Section 2675, , as added , , , related to projects for construction, prescribing in: subsec. (a) for submission of application and its contents, subsec. (b) for approval by Secretary, subsec. (c) for a hearing prior to disapproval, and subsec. (d) for amendment of application.Pub. L. 88–164, title I, § 135Pub. L. 91–517, title I, § 101(b)84 Stat. 1321Oct. 30, 1970

A prior section 2675, , , , provided for the submission of an application for approval by the Secretary, of projects for construction, set forth the contents of such application, provided for hearing prior to disapproval, and subjected to approval any amendment of an approved application.Pub.
